tagline: A 15-class Python-first path from coding basics to small AI research projects.

courses.title: Python for AI Research
courses.subtitle: A 15-class Python-first path from coding basics to small AI research projects.

decks.title: Course Introduction and Your First Python Notebook
decks.summary: Colab setup, print, variables, data types, input, f-strings, and a first learning profile notebook.

decks.title: Python Control Flow
decks.summary: Conditions, comparisons, if / elif / else, for / while loops, break / continue, and rule-based classification.

decks.title: Python Functions
decks.summary: def, function calls, parameters, return values, scope, docstrings, and reusable helper functions.

decks.title: Python Lists and 2D Lists
decks.summary: Indexing, traversal, updating by index, nested lists, nested loops, and simple table-like data.

decks.title: Python Tuples and Unpacking
decks.summary: Ordered immutable records, unpacking, tuple updates, starred unpacking, and multiple return values.

decks.title: Python Dictionaries and Word Frequency
decks.summary: Key-value mapping, get / keys / values / items, updating dictionaries, and a word-frequency mini project.
